properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: JWT signing secret in Base64 format.

properties.name: razorpay.key.id
properties.description: Razorpay API key id for checkout initialization.

properties.name: razorpay.key.secret
properties.description: Razorpay API key secret used for server-side operations and signature verification.

properties.name: weather.api.key
properties.description: Weather service API key for smart advisory features.

properties.name: cloudinary.cloud-name
properties.description: Cloudinary cloud name for proof image uploads.

properties.name: cloudinary.upload-preset
properties.description: Unsigned Cloudinary upload preset for image uploads.

properties.name: spring.h2.console.enabled
properties.description: Enable H2 database web console in local/test profiles.

properties.name: spring.h2.console.path
properties.description: Path for the H2 console endpoint.

properties.name: spring.jpa.packages-to-scan
properties.description: Entity packages to scan for JPA mapping.
